review: Customer reviews about broker Nathan Martin: "Dear Nathan,Thank you so much for all you have done for us to get us into our first home. Your patience and tenacity were much appreciated. We couldn't have done this without you.I am so thankful we decided to have you as our Realtor.We have seen second hand a Realtor who was not therefor the client after the sale was complete, we recommend your broker hire more people like Nathan, he was patient, knowlegable, available and unpretentious.Much thanks, Anonymous""Dear Nathan,We just wanted to write you a quick note to say how much we appreciated your professionalism and courteous nature.Having moved 4 times in our lives, we must say we were impressed by how smoothly the process was, we are used to having glitches of some sort. Thanks again.""Dear Nathan,Thank you for your excellent service. Our expectations were very well served. We enjoyed working with you.SincerelyAnonymous"

Lindsay Sager found an incredible new home for me and represented me in the purchase. She is incredibly professional and super helpful. She kept me sane during the stressful period of getting my previous home sold, and I will be forever grateful. I would 100% recommend her.

I am a broker with RE/MAX Whatcom County, Inc. Lori's team is a well-rounded group of professionals servicing a variety of markets and consumer bases. From luxury waterfront real estate to modest first time homes, there are brokers suited to any consumer need. As a broker myself, I appreciate the continual educational opportunities, the networking, and the team atmosphere. RE/MAX is a powerful international brand and Lori Reece's leadership ensures that RE/MAX Whatcom County, Inc. is a strong influence in the Pacific Northwest. Proud to be part of the team here in Whatcom County and representing Sudden Valley!

I have known, Lori Reece since 2002, and she is a fabulous real estate broker/owner. She has always gone out of her way to be of help and assistance, either providing information directly herself or connecting me to the best source for more information. Being another RE/MAX broker/owner myself, there is no real financial incentive in it for her - so this speaks well to her generosity of character and commitment to living with excellence. Thanks, Lori!

RE/MAX Whatcom County is the epitome of a well run company. With a wide range of high quality agents and a Broker who has been in the business for over 30 years, they have a well deserved reputation for their professional, well educated, caring agents who represent their clients with the highest level of integrity. We are lucky to have such a great company in Whatcom County.
